description: Ward and Agent 33 execute their plan and successfully break Sunil Bakshi out of Talbot's base, using disguise and deception. Tension rises as they neutralize security personnel and confront Bakshi, who is uncertain of their purpose. The rescue/capture demonstrates both effective teamwork and the dangerous agenda they've adopted.

transcript.line: What is it you want? Agent 33. Loyal to the very end. What are you doing here?
Agent 33, you need to listen to me very carefully. You've lost your way. Take a deep breath. Calm your mind, and your compliance will be...
Then who the hell was that masquerading as my wife?
Th-The guard wasn't at the front, so I just walked in.
Put your face on the carpet!
Okay! God! What is wrong with you?! God, I-I-I even brought those little pork taquitos that you like so much. Honey...
